usage: rhodyn [-h]
              {validate,score-residence,decide-coupling,summarize-reserve,export-markdown,simulate,compare,sensitivity,ctc-to-trajectory,ctc-lineage-to-trajectory,paper-case-study,extras} ...

Dynamic residence-state analysis toolkit.

positional arguments:
  {validate,score-residence,decide-coupling,summarize-reserve,export-markdown,simulate,compare,sensitivity,ctc-to-trajectory,ctc-lineage-to-trajectory,paper-case-study,extras}
    validate            Validate a tidy input CSV.
    score-residence     Score residence-window summaries for a trajectory
                        table.
    decide-coupling     Classify bounded-coupling interval rows.
    summarize-reserve   Summarize reserve-like response rows.
    export-markdown     Export a compact Markdown summary for a CSV table.
    simulate            Run a minimal controller simulation.
    compare             Rank reduced-model endpoint fits.
    sensitivity         Score residence summaries across a low/high window
                        grid.
    ctc-to-trajectory   Convert CTC-style track features into trajectory CSV.
    ctc-lineage-to-trajectory
                        Convert a CTC man_track.txt lineage table into
                        trajectory CSV.
    paper-case-study    Print optional manuscript case-study metadata.
    extras              Print optional dependency groups and planned first
                        uses.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

interpretation_boundary: This dry run validates packaging and installation only. It does not upload to PyPI or change RhoDyn analysis behavior.
